translation: Symbol Description i ∈{1, . . . , N} Timestamp index; Nis the total number of timestamps. σi Scheduling plan at timestamp i, specifying model assignment and parallelism. σ= {σ1, . . . , σN} Sequence of scheduling plans o
source_text: Symbol Description i ∈{1, . . . , N} Timestamp index; Nis the total number of timestamps. σi Scheduling plan at timestamp i, specifying model assignment and parallelism. σ= {σ1, . . . , σN} Sequence of scheduling plans over the time horizon. Ttotal Total end-to-end latency over the time horizon. d ∈D GPU device in the heterogeneous device set D = {d1, . . . , dK}. md Memory capacity of device d. g∈G GPU type in the type set G = {g1, . . . , gP }. κg Total device count for GPU type g. mg, Fg, Bg, Pg Per-device HBM capacity, peak FP16 throughput, HBM bandwidth, PCIe bandwidth of type g. M = {M1, . . . , MZ} Set of Zmodels. Wz= {wz,1, . . . , wz,Jz} Set of Jzworkload types for model Mz. Wz Total weight size of model Mzin bytes (see Equation 2). λz,i Total concurrent request count (batch size) for Mzat timestamp i. sp z,i, sd z,i Prefill (input) and decode (output) lengths for Mzat timestamp i. bmax z,i Maximum per-replica batch size for Mzat timestamp i. Tg Set of valid tensor-parallel (TP) degrees for GPU type g. Bz,i Candidate per-replica batch sizes for Mzat timestamp i. nz,g,t,b∈Z≥0 Number of replicas of Mzon GPU type gwith TP degree t and batch size b. yz,g,t,b∈{0, 1} Indicator:1 iff replica group (z, g, t, b) is active. Lz Completion latency of model Mz(slowest active replica group). Tbalanced Global makespan:maxz∈M Lz. SERVE-COST(σi) Serving latency to process workloads under plan σi. RECONFIG-COST(σi−1, σi) Reconfiguration overhead between consecutive scheduling plans. STALE-COST(σi) Penalty for stale or delayed serving at timestamp i. SCHED-COST Scheduling overhead (ILP solve time). τ(z, g) Weight transfer time for model Mzon GPU type gvia PCIe. cz PCIe bandwidth efficiency coefficient for model Mz.
